title: Fix deployment failures — resolve all build and compilation errors

requirements.text: Audit and fix all compilation errors in `backend/main.mo` and `backend/migration.mo` so the Motoko actor compiles cleanly. Verify that: stable storage declarations are syntactically correct, all imported modules resolve, and the `addRecord`, `getAllRecords`, and `getRecordById` endpoints have valid type signatures matching the HealthRecord shape (age, bmi, bloodPressure, glucose, hemoglobin, cholesterol, gender, smoker, riskScore, riskLevel, timestamp). The backend must compile without errors before deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: `backend/main.mo` compiles without any Motoko type or syntax errors.
`backend/migration.mo` compiles without errors and is compatible with `main.mo`.
Stable storage variables are correctly declared so data persists across upgrades.
`addRecord`, `getAllRecords`, and `getRecordById` have valid, consistent type signatures.

requirements.text: Audit and fix all TypeScript compilation errors in the frontend so the build pipeline completes successfully. Specifically: ensure `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` correctly maps the backend Candid interface for `addRecord` and `getAllRecords`; ensure the `HealthRecord` TypeScript type exactly matches all backend fields; and ensure `RiskPredictor.tsx`, `Dashboard.tsx`, `History.tsx`, and `XRayAnalysis.tsx` all compile without type errors. The `npm run build` command must succeed with zero errors.
acceptanceCriteria: `npm run build` completes successfully with no TypeScript errors.
`HealthRecord` type in `useQueries.ts` matches all fields returned by the backend.
`useAddRecord` and `useGetAllRecords` hooks correctly call the backend Candid methods.
All four page components (`RiskPredictor.tsx`, `Dashboard.tsx`, `History.tsx`, `XRayAnalysis.tsx`) compile without errors.
No implicit `any` or missing property errors in the frontend build output.

constraints: Do not modify files under `frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts`, `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts`, `frontend/src/main.tsx`, or `frontend/src/components/ui`.
Keep all Motoko logic in a single actor in `backend/main.mo`.
Do not change the existing HealthRecord data schema or remove any existing API endpoints.
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or layout.
Migrating to a different backend language or frontend framework.
